hypothesis: If a stereochemistry-aware diffusion model (LoQI) is trained on QM-optimized ChEMBL3D conformers, then it will generate topology-preserving, stereochemically correct molecular conformers with lower relative energies and lower RMSD to reference structures than existing rule-based and ML methods, because explicit R/S and E/Z graph augmentations combined with an equivariant DiT+EGNN architecture capture and enforce quantum-mechanical geometry constraints.
